name: micro-rep-penalty
description: L1 (item 16) on the micro gradient: identical to micro-baseline EXCEPT sampling adds repetition_penalty=1.1 + repetition_context_size=20 (mlx-lm 0.31.3 reads both from the request body; wire path verified 2026-06-24). Anti-repetition; targets degenerate decode loops. Counterpart control: micro-baseline. Measures whether anti-repetition holds or hurts the near-ceiling micro pass-rate (T1 4/4, T2 ~4-6/6).
